message:
fix(net): use registration_interest helper for Unix stream interest calculation

Replace direct `reg.interest() | interest` accumulation with the
`registration_interest()` helper that correctly computes combined
interest based on whether read and write wakers are active. The
previous approach could accumulate stale interest flags from the
registration, potentially causing spurious wakeups or missed events
when one half of a split stream was dropped.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
